timeline_events.title: Katalin Karikó and Drew Weissman publish foundational mRNA paper at University of Pennsylvania
timeline_events.description: Katalin Karikó and Drew Weissman publish foundational mRNA paper at University of Pennsylvania

timeline_events.title: Dr. Thomas Madden (Cullis collaborator) founds AlCana Technologies (later Acuitas)
timeline_events.description: Dr. Thomas Madden (Cullis collaborator) founds AlCana Technologies (later Acuitas)

timeline_events.title: Penn exclusively licenses patent to mRNA RiboTherapeutics (Madison, WI)
timeline_events.description: Penn exclusively licenses patent to mRNA RiboTherapeutics (Madison, WI)

timeline_events.title: Karikó "kicked out" of Penn, "forced to retire" - joins BioNTech in Germany
timeline_events.description: Karikó "kicked out" of Penn, "forced to retire" - joins BioNTech in Germany

timeline_events.title: Arbutus licenses LNP patents to Acuitas
timeline_events.description: Arbutus licenses LNP patents to Acuitas

timeline_events.title: DARPA awards Moderna **~$1.4 million** for "modified RNA technology for production of antibodies for
timeline_events.description: DARPA awards Moderna **~$1.4 million** for "modified RNA technology for production of antibodies for immune prophylaxis"

timeline_events.title: DARPA awards Moderna **up to $25 million** under ADEPT-PROTECT program
timeline_events.description: DARPA awards Moderna **up to $25 million** under ADEPT-PROTECT program

timeline_events.title: mRNA RiboTherapeutics sublicenses to affiliate Cellscript LLC
timeline_events.description: mRNA RiboTherapeutics sublicenses to affiliate Cellscript LLC

timeline_events.title: Acuitas grants sublicense to Moderna; Arbutus declares it improper
timeline_events.description: Acuitas grants sublicense to Moderna; Arbutus declares it improper

timeline_events.title: Acuitas enters development agreement with CureVac (including LNP patents)
timeline_events.description: Acuitas enters development agreement with CureVac (including LNP patents)

timeline_events.title: Dr. Anthony Fauci delivers keynote at Georgetown University
timeline_events.description: Dr. Anthony Fauci delivers keynote at Georgetown University

timeline_events.title: Cellscript sublicenses to **Moderna** (BEFORE pandemic)
timeline_events.description: Cellscript sublicenses to **Moderna** (BEFORE pandemic)

timeline_events.title: Cellscript sublicenses to **BioNTech** (BEFORE pandemic)
timeline_events.description: Cellscript sublicenses to **BioNTech** (BEFORE pandemic)

timeline_events.title: Litigation settled between Acuitas and Arbutus; Moderna begins filing patent challenges
timeline_events.description: Litigation settled between Acuitas and Arbutus; Moderna begins filing patent challenges

timeline_events.title: Johns Hopkins Center for Health Security, **World Economic Forum**, and **Bill & Melinda Gates Found
timeline_events.description: Johns Hopkins Center for Health Security, **World Economic Forum**, and **Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation** host "Event 201"

timeline_events.title: Dr. Ralph Baric at UNC signs agreement to receive "mRNA coronavirus vaccine candidates developed and
timeline_events.description: Dr. Ralph Baric at UNC signs agreement to receive "mRNA coronavirus vaccine candidates developed and jointly-owned by NIAID and Moderna"

timeline_events.title: UNC's Jacqueline Quay signs
timeline_events.description: UNC's Jacqueline Quay signs

timeline_events.title: Moderna's Sunny Himansu and Shaun Ryan sign
timeline_events.description: Moderna's Sunny Himansu and Shaun Ryan sign

timeline_events.title: WHO "becomes aware" of viral pneumonia in Wuhan
timeline_events.description: WHO "becomes aware" of viral pneumonia in Wuhan

timeline_events.title: WHO reports "novel coronavirus"
timeline_events.description: WHO reports "novel coronavirus"

timeline_events.title: SARS-CoV-2 genome published
timeline_events.description: SARS-CoV-2 genome published

timeline_events.title: cGMP production initiated (3 days)
timeline_events.description: cGMP production initiated (3 days)

timeline_events.title: First Phase 1 trial participant vaccinated (**66 days** after sequence)
timeline_events.description: First Phase 1 trial participant vaccinated (**66 days** after sequence)

timeline_events.title: Phase 2 begins (**74 days** after Phase 1)
timeline_events.description: Phase 2 begins (**74 days** after Phase 1)

financial_flows.description: - BioNTech paid Hospital of University of Pennsylvania **$1.2 billion** in 10 royalty payments (2021-2022)
- **March 22, 2013**: DARPA awards Moderna **~$1.4 million** for "modified RNA technology for production of antibodies for immune prophylaxis"
- **October 2, 2013**: DARPA awards Moderna **up to $25 million** under ADEPT-PROTECT program
